description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master or v0.23.x branches, and pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have read permissions to repository contents. It should have three jobs: build-linux, build-macos, and build-msys2. The build-linux job should use a matrix strategy to build with different compilers on ubuntu-22.04, install dependencies, cache ccache, and perform full and mini builds with meson. The build-macos job should run on macos-latest, install dependencies with Homebrew, and perform a build with meson. The build-msys2 job should use a matrix strategy to build on windows-latest with different MSYS2 platforms, install dependencies, and compile and test with meson.
